en: AAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHH!

en: LET'S BEAT IT!

en: RUUUUN!

en: Watch out! #1.00 Monsters!

en: Bats! #0.90 I prefer the sporty type.

en: Throwing around some potions will surely #2.00 give this grey hell a makeover.

en: I hope I can be of some help here. #2.00 I'm less about brute force. #4.00 I'm more of a liquid liquidation lady.
pl: Mam nadzieję, że się tu na coś przydam. #2.00 Nie jestem od brutalnej siły. #4.00 Jestem bardziej od płynnej likwidacji.

en: See that coin over there?

en: Eyes are way tastier than you might think. #3.20 And they help cure sickness.

en: Look at those silly eyes, #2.00 rolling around like that...

en: I'll let you have that sword. #1.80 I'm good, thanks.

en: Always eat your leek! #1.70 It makes for strong nostril hair.

en: Did you know honey is the healthiest of foods?

en: Bees work really hard to make the best #2.50 product they can come up with. #4.00 I find that inspiring.
